//: Make local-development manifest. Reconciled with the remote app when linked via the Make Apps VS Code extension ('Local development for Apps'). 'origins' is filled in then.

openSession.label: Open Browser Session
openSession.description: Start a new cloud browser session. Call this first; returns a sessionId you must pass to every other tool.

navigate.label: Navigate
navigate.description: Open a URL in the session. Requires sessionId. Returns a fresh snapshot of interactive elements.

snapshot.label: Snapshot Page
snapshot.description: Return a numbered list of interactive elements on the current page. Requires sessionId.

click.label: Click Element
click.description: Click an element by its ref number from the latest snapshot. Requires sessionId.

type.label: Type Text
type.description: Type text into an input element by ref. Optionally press Enter. Requires sessionId.

getText.label: Get Text
getText.description: Read text from a specific ref, or the whole page when ref is omitted. Requires sessionId.

screenshot.label: Screenshot
screenshot.description: Capture a base64 PNG of the current viewport (for vision models). Requires sessionId.

release.label: Release Session
release.description: End the cloud browser session. Call this when the goal is achieved to stop billing for idle time. Requires sessionId.
